title: vitex agnus-castus f. alba
intro: Vitex agnus-castus f. alba, also known as White Chaste Tree, is a flowering plant that is a variant of the Vitex agnus-castus species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and hormonal balancing effects. The health benefits of Vitex agnus-castus f. alba include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and anxiety, as well as support for reproductive health and hormone balance. Herbal preparations of Vitex agnus-castus f. alba include teas, tinctures, capsules, and dried flowers, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
